english: This is Sgt. Miller. I'm takin' Condor Squad in to clear out the facility.
chinese: 我是 Miller 中士。我带神鹰小队进去清剿这处设施。（基地警报：警告！敌方来袭！）

english: We're a lost cause! Do not attempt to evac us.
chinese: 我们没救了！不要试图撤离我们。

english: Armadillo Squad, you have to flank left. Flank left, damn it!
chinese: 犰狳小队，你们得从左翼包抄。从左翼包抄，妈的！

english: Comm uplink has been established and systems are in the green. Proceed to your first target Bison squad.
chinese: 通讯上行链路已建立，各系统状态正常。野牛小队，向你们的第一个目标推进。

english: Viper squad, this is H Q. Mantis squad is M I A and unresponsive. Fall back to rally point alpha niner four.
chinese: 毒蛇小队，这里是总部。螳螂小队已失踪，无法取得联络。撤退到集结点 Alpha 94。

english: Mayday! Mayday! This is the U.S.S. Patton - we have sustained heavy damage...
chinese: 求救！求救！这里是 U.S.S. Patton 号——我们受创严重……

english: ... aircraft loss of 65%. We're taking a lot of heat from the air defense cannon. Ground based troops...
chinese: ……飞行器损失 65%。防空炮的火力压得我们抬不起头。地面部队……

english: HQ, we can't advance. Dust is clogging the intakes of the hover tanks.
chinese: 总部，我们无法前进。沙尘堵住了悬浮坦克的进气口。

english: We're being overrun! Launch an air strike on my position now!
chinese: 我们快被冲垮了！立刻对我的位置发动空袭！

english: Kane! This is Sgt. Bidwell. We need you here ASAP. We've gotta bring the air defense cannon down.
chinese: Kane！我是 Bidwell 中士。你得尽快赶过来。我们必须把防空炮打掉。

english: What's the hold up, Kane? Find us immediately.
chinese: 磨蹭什么呢，Kane？马上来找我们。

english: Kane, this is Sgt. Bidwell. Stop pissin' around and hook up with us.
chinese: Kane，我是 Bidwell 中士。别瞎晃悠了，赶紧跟我们会合。

english: Kane, this is Bidwell. Don't make me come lookin' for you.
chinese: Kane，我是 Bidwell。别逼我亲自去找你。

english: Walker Squad Bison, advance. Fire at will.
chinese: 野牛机甲小队，前进。自由开火。

english: We copy that, bison squad. You are cleared to aid the foot soldiers.
chinese: 收到，野牛小队。批准你们支援步兵。

english: H Q, this is Bison Squad. The situation is under control.
chinese: 总部，这里是野牛小队。局势已在掌控之中。

english: Sgt. Bidwell, this is Voss. I think I've found a way to get at that cannon. Can you reach Kane?
chinese: Bidwell 中士，我是 Voss。我好像找到对付那门炮的办法了。你能联系上 Kane 吗？

english: Good. Kane, go to the Strogg hangars. Viper squad will rendezvous with you there. If you can take out the launching bays, the fliers won't be a problem. Voss out.
chinese: 很好。Kane，前往 Strogg 机库。毒蛇小队会在那里和你会合。只要能端掉发射舱，那些飞行器就不足为患了。Voss 完毕。

english: Bravo Team here! We've got a situaton in alpha niner. Requesting backup for the  . . . Oh, God, just send backup now!
chinese: 这里是 Bravo 小队！Alpha 9 区出状况了。请求增援，我们……哦，天哪，快派增援来就是了！

english: Heads up. The Strogg are breaking through our perimiter. They'll be on us in 3...2...1
chinese: 注意。Strogg 正在突破我们的防线。他们马上杀到，3……2……1

english: HQ, this is Fox Squad in sector 6A. We have engaged the Strogg.
chinese: 总部，这里是 6A 区的狐狸小队。我们已与 Strogg 交火。

english: Do you require assistance?
chinese: 需要支援吗？

english: Affirmative. Send an additional squad immediately.
chinese: 确认。请立即增派一个小队。

english: HQ, HQ, our squad's pinned down and meeting heavy resistance. We've run out of... aaaah!
chinese: 总部，总部，我们小队被火力压制，遭遇顽强抵抗。我们已经打光了……啊——！

english: Sarge. We got movement - at bearing 221. I count six signals.
chinese: 中士，发现动静——方位 221。我数到六个信号。

english: I want a straight V formation. Holtz, you take point.
chinese: 给我摆一个标准 V 字队形。Holtz，你当尖兵。

english: Got it.
chinese: 明白。

english: Don't bunch up and remember to check the ceilings.
chinese: 别扎堆，记得留意天花板。

english: Destroyer, U.S.S. Madison, has achieved sub-orbital position. Com-links established with primary tactical operation HQs. All company commanders transmit sit-reps immediately.
chinese: 驱逐舰 U.S.S. Madison 号已进入亚轨道位置。已与各主要战术指挥总部建立通讯链路。全体连指挥官立即上报战况。

english: HQ, we have engaged the Strogg.
chinese: 总部，我们已与 Strogg 交火。

english: Roger that. We read you at sector 25 L.
chinese: 收到。我们确认你们位于 25L 区。

english: Affirmative, HQ. We're meeting heavy resistance.
chinese: 确认，总部。我们遭遇顽强抵抗。

english: Watch the left flank!
chinese: 注意左翼！

english: Over here!
chinese: 这边！

english: Throw a charge!
chinese: 扔炸药包！

english: Get down!
chinese: 趴下！

english: Do you require reinforcements? Silence.
chinese: 你们需要增援吗？（无人应答）

english: I repeat. Do you require reinforcements?
chinese: 重复一遍。你们需要增援吗？

english: Negative. The situation is under control.
chinese: 不需要。局势已在掌控之中。

english: This is Famine Convoy, grid is down.
chinese: 这里是饥荒车队，防御网已瘫痪。

english: This is Pestilence Convoy, grid is down.
chinese: 这里是瘟疫车队，防御网已瘫痪。

english: This is War. The Defense Grid is fully deactivated.
chinese: 这里是战争车队。防御网已完全瘫痪。

english: Shit! We've been spotted by Strogg fliers! They're coming in for a...
chinese: 妈的！我们被 Strogg 飞行器发现了！他们正俯冲过来准备……

english: War. Come in. War, please respond.
chinese: 战争车队，请回话。战争车队，请回答。

english: Kane, we're movin' out before the Strogg finds our convoy. We've left a hover tank for you. Grab it and you'll be able to rendezvous with us in no time. Bidwell, out.
chinese: Kane，趁 Strogg 还没发现车队，我们先出发了。给你留了一辆悬浮坦克。开上它，你很快就能跟我们会合。Bidwell，完毕。

english: Hang on, we got Strogg moving in for the kill!
chinese: 坚持住，Strogg 正扑上来下杀手！

english: Ramming speed!
chinese: 全速撞过去！

english: Keep back! We're coming in fast!
chinese: 退后！我们要高速冲进来了！

english: You must be my escort. Nice of you to show up. Take me back to the door they want opened.
chinese: 你就是护送我的人吧。可算露面了。带我回他们要打开的那扇门那儿。

english: Rodger that.
chinese: 收到。

english: I will be locking the door behind you.
chinese: 你过去之后，我会把门锁上。

english: Kane, what's the hold up? It's imperative you get to Sub-Entrance 1 ASAP.
chinese: Kane，还磨蹭什么？你必须尽快赶到 1 号副入口，刻不容缓。

english: To continue you must find the console that manually primes the door to sub-entrance 2..
chinese: 要继续前进，你必须找到能手动预激活 2 号副入口大门的控制台。

english: Very good. Now activating the door.
chinese: 很好。正在启动大门。

english: Just got word the Engineering team has seen Strogg in their vicinity. Step it up, Kane.
chinese: 刚收到消息，工程队在他们附近发现了 Strogg。加快脚步，Kane。

english: Yes, I see where you are - I cannot open that door from here. Find the console that allows you to manually prime it.
chinese: 好，我看到你的位置了——那扇门我没法从这边打开。去找那台能让你手动预激活它的控制台。

english: Ah, much better.
chinese: 啊，这就好多了。

english: Corporal Kane, can you hear me? Hopefully the shielding around the Core will not completely block my signal.
chinese: Kane 下士，能听到我吗？但愿核心周围的屏蔽层不会把我的信号完全隔断。

english: Remember your primary goal is to locate and destroy the Nexus. That will disable the Strogg communication network.
chinese: 记住，你的首要目标是找到并摧毁 Nexus。那将使 Strogg 的通讯网络陷入瘫痪。

english: I must admit to being envious of you, Corporal Kane. The technology you are witnessing must be truly spectacular.
chinese: 我得承认我很羡慕你，Kane 下士。你正亲眼目睹的科技，想必蔚为壮观。

english: You are about to enter the room that houses the Nexus, Corporal Kane. Watch yourself, no doubt it will be heavily guarded.
chinese: 你马上就要进入安置 Nexus 的房间了，Kane 下士。当心，那里毫无疑问守卫森严。

english: You did it, Kane! You are now looking at a sight only the Makron has ever laid eyes on. The Nexus is the backbone of the Strogg war machine. Destroy it, and you save Earth.
chinese: 你做到了，Kane！你现在看到的景象，只有 Makron 曾亲眼见过。Nexus 是 Strogg 战争机器的支柱。摧毁它，就能拯救地球。

english: To any Marines... Head to the Waste Facility. Just outside is your extraction point.
chinese: 致所有陆战队员……前往废料处理厂。撤离点就在厂区外面。

english: Viper Squad, this is Morris. HQ�s finally located a demolitionist for the hangars. He should be there soon.
chinese: 毒蛇小队，我是 Morris。总部总算找到了负责机库的爆破手。他应该很快就到。

english: The demolitionist is waiting for the all clear before advancing.
chinese: 爆破手正在等待安全确认信号，之后才会推进。

english: Kane, this is Morris. The demolitionist should be near the top of the elevator.
chinese: Kane，我是 Morris。爆破手应该就在电梯顶部附近。

english: Rhodes, if you're done with Viper squad, send 'em on down to my position.
chinese: Rhodes，如果毒蛇小队那边的事办完了，就让他们下来到我这个位置。

english: Detonation in 3... 2... 1
chinese: 起爆倒计时 3……2……1

english: Hey, Rhodes. If you kids are done playin' around, why don't you send Kane down my way? Voss wants us back at the air defense cannon on the double.
chinese: 嘿，Rhodes。你们这帮小子要是玩够了，就把 Kane 打发到我这儿来怎么样？Voss 要我们立刻回防空炮那边。

english: Sorry, big boy. Voss wants you to stay put. Another team may need your services. Morris, out.
chinese: 抱歉了，大个子。Voss 要你原地待命。别的队伍可能还需要你帮忙。Morris，完毕。

english: All right, Marines. Listen up. The Strogg have taken out the other convoys, we're all that's left. This mission's too big for any screw-ups. No one take any chances, no one try to be the hero. Voss out.
chinese: 好了，陆战队员们，都听好。Strogg 干掉了其他车队，就剩我们了。这次任务太重大，容不得半点差错。谁都别冒险，谁都别逞英雄。Voss 完毕。

english: You�ll be fine, Strauss. Kane, get out here on the double. Voss, out.
chinese: 你不会有事的，Strauss。Kane，马上出来，动作快。Voss，完毕。

english: Good job. The forcefield's down, Kane. Return to the squad immediately.
chinese: 干得好。力场已经解除，Kane。立刻归队。

english: Yes, sir.
chinese: 是，长官。

english: Lieutenant Voss, this is Strauss. What has happened?
chinese: Voss 中尉，我是 Strauss。发生什么事了？

english: Ja. But it means I have to go directly to the Tetranode.
chinese: Ja。不过这就意味着我必须直接前往 四元节点。

english: If my memory of the building schematics is correct, Kane must take a crawlway out. I will meet him at the other end.
chinese: 如果我对建筑图纸的记忆没错，Kane 必须从一条爬行通道出去。我会在通道另一头接应他。

english: Corporal Kane, this is Strauss. I am in great danger. Rendezvous with me immediately!
chinese: Kane 下士，我是 Strauss。我处境非常危险。立刻来和我会合！

english: The area you are in stretches between all facilities in this complex.
chinese: 你所在的这片区域，在这座建筑群的各个设施之间延伸贯通。

english: Nearby is a maintenance platform. Get onboard.
chinese: 附近有一座维修平台。登上去。

english: There should be a console in the center of the room, Corporal Kane. Activate that and the coolant pumps will shut down. In a matter of minutes, the Tetranode will overheat and destroy itself. And this will render the Nexus useless to the Strogg.
chinese: 房间中央应该有一台控制台，Kane 下士。启动它，冷却泵就会停止运转。几分钟之内，四元节点 就会过热自毁。这样一来，Nexus 对 Strogg 就毫无用处了。

english: Ah, excellent. Corporal Kane, the Tertanode will soon be destroyed and the Nexus will become inoperative.
chinese: 啊，太好了。Kane 下士，四元节点 很快就会被摧毁，Nexus 也将随之停摆。

english: Corporal Kane, this is Strauss. I have detected a tremendously large life form in your vicinity. You must get out of there quickly.
chinese: Kane 下士，我是 Strauss。我在你附近探测到一个极其庞大的生命体。你必须赶快离开那里。

english: Kane... It can't be! ... It's the Makron!!
chinese: Kane……不可能！……是 Makron！！

english: Get out of there, Kane! Get out!! Suddenly a loud thud can be heard over the comlink.
chinese: 快离开那里，Kane！快出去！！突然，通讯频道里传来一声巨响。

english: ... who is there?
chinese: ……谁在那里？

english: Flooding chamber with trichlorite and septazine. After a few seconds.
chinese: 正在向舱内注入三氯酸盐和七氮嗪。几秒钟后。

english: Chamber at maximum saturation.
chinese: 舱内已达到最大饱和度。

english: Purging chamber.
chinese: 正在排空舱室。

english: Decontamination cycle complete.
chinese: 消毒流程完成。

english: But a Strogg unit is headed directly for Cougar squad.
chinese: 但有一支 Strogg 部队正直扑美洲狮小队。

english: Then they're all dead men. Richards out.
chinese: 那他们就死定了。Richards 完毕。

english: Kane, I would remind you the existence of all humanity rests on your shoulders - but I wouldn't want you to feel any pressure. So all I will say, is don't get yourself killed, my friend.
chinese: Kane，我本该提醒你，全人类的存亡都系于你一身——不过我可不想给你压力。所以我只说一句：别把自己弄死了，我的朋友。

english: Good luck, sir. Automated navigation will take you right to the Data Storage Terminal. Have a safe flight.
chinese: 祝你好运，长官。自动导航会把你直接送到数据存储终端。祝飞行顺利。

english: My turret�s been hit . . . aaaah, I'm on fire. Heeeelp meeee!
chinese: 我的炮塔被击中了……啊啊，我着火了。救救我——！

english: Harvesters approaching on the left flank.  We need walkers over there ASAP!
chinese: 收割者正从左翼逼近。马上派步行机甲过去支援！

english: Walker Bison 5 is on fire!  Get Banks out of there!
chinese: 野牛 5 号步行机甲着火了！快把 Banks 救出来！

english: HQ, this Bison commander. Get us some air support right now or we�re all dead men.
chinese: 总部，我是野牛小队指挥官。立刻给我们空中支援，不然我们全都得死。

english: Badger squad, this is HQ. Set up a defensive position at coordinates 43,82. Render assistance to Bison squad.
chinese: 猛獾小队，这里是总部。在坐标 43, 82 建立防御阵地，支援野牛小队。

english: Roger that, HQ. Advancing to coordinates 43, 82.
chinese: 收到，总部。正在向坐标 43, 82 推进。

english: Where the hell is that air support?
chinese: 该死的空中支援到底在哪儿？

english: ETA is 3 minutes.
chinese: 预计 3 分钟后到达。

english: We aren�t gonna last that long.
chinese: 我们撑不了那么久。

english: Another Strogg transport just landed! Where the hell are they all coming from?
chinese: 又一架 Strogg 运输机降落了！这些家伙到底是从哪儿冒出来的？

english: Strogg flyers approaching at 3 O�clock.
chinese: Strogg 飞行器正从 3 点钟方向接近。

english: I�m on �em.
chinese: 我来收拾他们。

english: Damn!  They just keep coming.
chinese: 该死！他们源源不断地冲过来。

english: Aaahhhh!  Yeah! Take that you freaking Squibs!
chinese: 啊——！爽！吃我这招，你们这帮该死的杂碎！

english: They�re trying to take engineering!
chinese: 他们想夺取轮机舱！

english: They�re all over the place!  I can�t stop them!
chinese: 到处都是他们！我拦不住了！

english: There�s too many!  There�s just too damn many!
chinese: 太多了！他妈的实在太多了！

english: Crap. I can�t get a lock on the flyers. They�re comin� in too low!
chinese: 该死，我没法锁定那些飞行器。他们飞得太低了！

english: Forget the damn computer. Target them visually.
chinese: 别管那破电脑了。用肉眼瞄准。

english: We have Strogg boarding parties on decks 2 and 3!
chinese: 2 号和 3 号甲板出现 Strogg 登舰部队！

english: Security, report to hangar, deck 2. Strogg boarding parties have been reported.
chinese: 警卫组，前往 2 号甲板机库报到。据报告发现 Strogg 登舰部队。

english: Welcome, Corporal Matthew Kane. Navigation online.
chinese: 欢迎，Matthew Kane 下士。导航系统已上线。

english: Engine prep cycle complete.
chinese: 引擎预热流程完成。

english: Prepare for launch.
chinese: 准备发射。

english: Kane, this is Morris. I'm not getting any younger. Get a move on.
chinese: Kane，我是 Morris。再等下去我都要老了。快点行动。

english: Research team Owl has arrived at the hangars and begun deploying equipment.
chinese: 猫头鹰研究小组已抵达机库，开始部署设备。

english: Kane, I'm getting tired of coolin' my heels. Get down here before I leave without you!
chinese: Kane，我等得都不耐烦了。快下来，不然我可就丢下你先走了！

english: Look! We've got fliers to study!
chinese: 快看！有飞行器可以研究了！

english: Kane, this is Morris. Where the hell are you? Get down here quick - we've got a war to win, remember?
chinese: Kane，我是 Morris。你到底在哪儿？快点下来——别忘了，我们还有一场仗要打赢呢。

english: The Hannibal is passing through the mesosphere. Heat shield is fully operational.
chinese: 汉尼拔号正在穿越中间层。隔热罩运转完全正常。

english: Now passing through the stratosphere. Breaking procedure has begun.
chinese: 正在穿越平流层。减速程序已启动。

english: The Hannibal is now in the troposphere - landing zone in sight.
chinese: 汉尼拔号已进入对流层——着陆区已在视野内。

english: We copy that.
chinese: 我们收到。

english: Our pleasure.
chinese: 乐意效劳。

english: The U.S.S. Hannibal has landed. I repeat, the Hannibal has landed. Welcome aboard, Marines.
chinese: 汉尼拔号已着陆。重复，汉尼拔号已着陆。欢迎登舰，陆战队员们。

english: Affirmative, Lieutenant. The Hannibal is now in geosynchronous orbit and beginning descent.
chinese: 明白，中尉。汉尼拔号已进入同步轨道，开始下降。

english: Yes, sir
chinese: 是，长官。

english: Clear the cannon for detonation!
chinese: 清空炮位区域，准备引爆！

english: Woo! Ha, haaa! Do I love my job!
chinese: 哇喔！哈，哈哈！我太爱这份工作了！

english: Anderson, this is Lt.Voss. Things are looking seriously fubared. Rendezvous back with us at the medlab storage facility - we'll head to the primary extraction point.
chinese: Anderson，我是 Voss 中尉。情况看起来已经烂得一塌糊涂。回医疗实验室储藏区与我们会合——我们随后前往主撤离点。

english: All right, Marines, haul ass. The clock is ticking and this is one flight we don�t wanna miss.
chinese: 好了，陆战队员们，都给我跑起来。时间紧迫，这趟航班我们可误不起。

english: This is command HQ to all units. A full retreat has been ordered. All squads are to meet at Waste Facility for immediate evac.
chinese: 指挥部呼叫所有单位。全面撤退命令已下达。所有小队立即前往废料处理厂集合，马上撤离。

english: Corporal Kane, I am very busy so I will make this brief.
chinese: Kane 下士，我很忙，所以长话短说。

english: This is the time you must deactivate the Core security interface. Once you have completed that objective, you will be taking the teleporter into the Core. There you must destroy the Nexus.
chinese: 现在你必须解除核心的安全接口。完成该目标后，你将乘传送器进入核心。在那里，你必须摧毁 Nexus。

english: For the moment, concern yourself with getting to the top of this tower. I will step you through the rest of this mission as you go.
chinese: 眼下，你只需专心登上这座塔的顶端。接下来的任务步骤，我会一路指引你。

english: Private Strauss, it looks like Corporal Kane has arrived.
chinese: Strauss 列兵，看来 Kane 下士已经到了。

english: This is Falcon 6 making a run on the Networking Tower. Anti-aircraft is heavy.
chinese: 这里是猎鹰 6 号，正在向网络塔发起突击。防空火力很猛。

english: I'm hit! Energizers are off line attempting to...
chinese: 我被击中了！供能器离线，正在尝试……

english: Eagle 10 making our run on the Networking Tower. Damn. The air defenses are strong.
chinese: 雄鹰 10 号正在向网络塔发起突击。该死，防空火力太强了。

english: I'm hit! I have to abort.
chinese: 我被击中了！我必须中止行动。

english: Aaaaaaaah! Aaaaaaaaaaaaaaah!
Shit. Get a medic up here ASAP! We were trying to demo a door and the charge misfired. Lt.Leonard was hurt.
chinese: 妈的。赶紧派个医疗兵上来！我们刚才想爆破一扇门，炸药走火了。Leonard 中尉受伤了。

english: A medic has been dispatched.
chinese: 医疗兵已经派出。

english: Do something!
chinese: 想想办法啊！

english: It's too late. He's dead.
chinese: 太迟了。他死了。

english: No, damn it. No.
chinese: 不，该死的。不。

english: Sorry, I did what I could. But I'm not a medic.
chinese: 抱歉，我已经尽力了。但我不是医疗兵。

english: No time for grieving. Looks like we've got a fight on our hands.
chinese: 没时间悲伤了。看来又有一场硬仗要打。

english: Corporal Kane, I have bypassed security for the floor you are on. Take the door that is now opening.
chinese: Kane 下士，我已经绕过了你所在楼层的安保系统。走那扇正在打开的门。

english: We don't dare risk landing pods on the roof until the anti-aircraft guns are taken out.
chinese: 在防空炮被端掉之前，我们不敢冒险往屋顶投放登陆舱。

english: Preparing to make a bombing run on the air defenses.
chinese: 准备对防空阵地进行一轮轰炸。

english: Roger that. I'm following you in.
chinese: 收到。我跟在你后面进入。

english: I can barely see the target through all the...
chinese: 我几乎看不清目标，到处都是……

english: Eagle 12's been hit!
chinese: 雄鹰 12 号被击中了！

english: Corporal Kane, leave one of your squad in the control room you're passing now.
chinese: Kane 下士，留一名队员在你正经过的控制室里。

english: Radar shows something large headed this way.
chinese: 雷达显示有个大家伙正朝这边过来。

english: We have a visual. The Guardian creature is headed our way. Damn is it fast.
chinese: 目视确认。那只守护者正朝我们过来。该死，它速度真快。

english: Kane, use the teleporter in front of you now. It will take you to the floor directly below the rooftop. There, you will have access to the security  station.
chinese: Kane，马上使用你面前的传送器。它会把你送到天台正下方的楼层。在那里你就能进入安保站。

english: The Guardian has landed on the side of the tower.
chinese: 守护者已经落在塔的侧面。

english: Ah, the Core security station is finally deactivated. I won't bother asking what took you so long. Quickly make your way to the Core Teleporter.
chinese: 啊，核心安保站总算解除了。我就不问你怎么磨蹭了这么久了。赶快前往核心传送器。

english: HQ, we have a Marine down at the Core teleporter.
chinese: 总部，核心传送器这边有一名陆战队员倒下了。

english: Perhaps he should have listened to me rather than trying to play the hero.
chinese: 也许他当初该听我的，而不是逞英雄。

english: He just wanted to get in there and battle the Strogg.
chinese: 他只是想冲进去跟 Strogg 干一仗。

english: That proved to be a mistake, didn't it?
chinese: 事实证明这是个错误，不是吗？

english: Kane, ignore the unfortunate soul laying dead on the ground. Because of your Strogg physiology you will be able to use the teleporter. Go now, it is the only way into the Core, and that houses the Nexus.
chinese: Kane，别管地上那个倒霉鬼了。凭你 Strogg 化的身体，你可以使用传送器。快去，这是进入核心区的唯一通道，Nexus 就在里面。

english: Corporal Kane, why do you hesitate to use the teleporter? Trust me when I say it is completely safe for you.
chinese: Kane 下士，你还在犹豫什么？相信我，传送器对你来说绝对安全。

english: Please, Corporal - use the teleporter. Men are dying as you hesitate to enter the Core.
chinese: 拜托，下士，快用传送器。你在核心区门口每犹豫一秒，就有人在送命。

english: Corporal Kane, it is imperative you use the teleporter now. The Nexus must be destroyed.
chinese: Kane 下士，你必须立刻使用传送器。Nexus 非摧毁不可。

english: Kane, this is Morris. Data Processing Tower's shut down. Looks like the Strogg are trying to stop us from reaching the core. You'll have to find  a way to bring it back online. Sledge is on his way. He should rendezvous with you shortly. Good luck. Morris out.
chinese: Kane，我是 Morris。数据处理塔断电停摆了，看来 Strogg 是想阻止我们接近核心区。你得想办法让它恢复运转。Sledge 已经在路上，很快会和你会合。祝好运。Morris，通话完毕。

english: Good job, Kane. The building's back online.
chinese: 干得好，Kane。整栋建筑恢复运转了。

english: Kane, this is Morris. Sledge just arrived at the Processing Tower. Hook up with him as soon as you can.
chinese: Kane，我是 Morris。Sledge 刚到数据处理塔，尽快跟他会合。

english: Gentlemen, Strauss's finally arrived at the Data Networking Tower. Your mission is gonna become more technical so I'm handing over communications to him. Good luck, guys. Get this mission done. Morris out.
chinese: 先生们，Strauss 总算抵达数据网络塔了。接下来的任务技术含量会越来越高，通讯指挥就交给他了。祝好运，伙计们，把任务给我拿下。Morris，通话完毕。

english: Cortez, this is Morris. Are you and Kane at the Processing Tower yet?
chinese: Cortez，我是 Morris。你和 Kane 到数据处理塔了吗？

english: Okay, drop off Kane. You're needed at the Networking Tower right away. Another tramcar will be sent for Kane once he's taken care of the security station at the top of the Processing Tower.
chinese: 好，让 Kane 下车。数据网络塔那边马上需要你。等 Kane 解决掉数据处理塔顶的安全站，会再派一辆轨道车去接他。

english: No can do, Alex. Sledge will be here soon enough to lend Kane a hand.
chinese: 不行，Alex。Sledge 很快就到，会给 Kane 搭把手。

english: Greetings, Corporals, this is Strauss. I have finally being to hack into the Nexus. Soon I will know all there is to know about the tower you are in.
chinese: 各位下士，你们好，我是 Strauss。我总算侵入 Nexus 了。用不了多久，你们所在塔楼的底细我就能摸得一清二楚。

english: The large machines in the area you have just entered are data pumps. They move information from the Networking Tower to the Storage Tower. This is a vital area to the Strogg so expect to meet strong resistance.
chinese: 你们刚进入的区域里，那些大型机器是数据泵，负责把信息从数据网络塔输送到数据存储塔。这里对 Strogg 至关重要，准备好迎接顽强抵抗吧。

english: They are information routers... but they appear to be out of alignment. Kane should be able use the consoles to correct this problem.
chinese: 那是信息路由器……不过看起来偏离了校准位。Kane 应该能用控制台修正这个问题。

english: That data stream you see will act as a guide. Once it�s path is corrected, the stream will lead you to the top floors of the processing tower.
chinese: 你看到的那道数据流会充当向导。修正它的路径之后，它就会把你引到处理塔的顶层。

english: We�re almost to the Processing Tower but we�ve been intercepted by a squadron of fliers!
chinese: 我们快到处理塔了，却被一中队飞行器拦截了！

english: Maybe, mayday! My pod�s been hit! I�m going down! I�m going down!!
chinese: 求救，求救！我的着陆舱被击中了！我在坠落！我在坠落！！

english: Navigation�s out . . . . propulsion�s damaged. I�m coming in like a rock!
chinese: 导航失灵……推进器受损。我这是直接往下砸啊！

english: There is nothing I can do for you in that section. Kane will have to find a solution.
chinese: 那个区域我无能为力。只能靠 Kane 自己想办法了。

english: The Core security interlock from the Processing Tower is now active. Well done, Corporal Kane. Sergeant Slidjonovitch, I would ask you to remain there and not allow the Strogg to reset that console.
chinese: 数据处理塔通往核心的安全联锁已经解除。干得好，Kane 下士。还有 Slidjonovitch 中士，请你留在原地，别让 Strogg 重置那台控制台。

english: Kane, you must now take the elevator down to the tram station and then take a tram to the Data Networking tower. I will meet you there. Strauss, out.
chinese: Kane，现在乘电梯下到轨道车站，再乘轨道车前往数据网络塔，我在那里等你。Strauss 通话完毕。

english: You're in the sterilization control room. There should be a way to turn on the system.
chinese: 你在消毒控制室里。应该有办法把系统打开。

english: Hey! You did it! The sterilization system is online.
chinese: 嘿！你成功了！消毒系统启动了。

english: Great. Looks like the whole system needs to be rebooted. You're gonna have to locate and restart both the sterilization and assembly subsystems.
chinese: 好嘛。看来整套系统都得重启。你得把消毒和装配两个子系统都找到，挨个重启。

english: First wave has launched. All Pods are in the green.
chinese: 第一波已发射。所有投送舱状态正常。

english: Funny, the Hannibal doesn't look as damaged from here.
chinese: 有意思，从这儿看，汉尼拔号伤得没那么重嘛。

english: Crap! There's anti-aircraft coming from all directions.
chinese: 糟了！四面八方全是防空火力。

english: Do not deviate from assigned flight plans.
chinese: 不得偏离既定飞行计划。

english: Mayday! Mayday! I'm hit! I'm goin' down!
chinese: 求救！求救！我中弹了！我要坠落了！

english: The shields around the terminals are affecting navigation. Watch your landing vectors.
chinese: 终端周围的护盾正在干扰导航，注意你们的着陆矢量。

english: There's a fire in my pod! I can't get fire suppression to activate!
chinese: 我的舱里起火了！灭火系统启动不了！

english: Dammit! Navigation is down. I'm flyin' blind!
chinese: 该死！导航失灵了，我这是在盲飞！

english: This is Private Terrance Garr. My pod crashed. I need a medic. I... I think my left leg's been severed.
chinese: 我是列兵 Terrance Garr。我的空投舱坠毁了，需要医疗兵。我……我的左腿好像整个断掉了。

english: Cobra squad, I'm in the level below you. I could use a hand here.
chinese: 眼镜蛇小队，我在你们下面一层。这边需要搭把手。

english: We're on our way.
chinese: 我们这就过去。

english: I hate flying in those freakin' pods. They're big metal coffins.
chinese: 我最烦坐那破空投舱了。那就是一口口大铁棺材。

english: We've done it, HQ! We've broken into the main armory!
chinese: 我们成功了，总部！我们攻进主军械库了！

english: Shit! My nav computer is screwed up! I'm gonna crash! I'm gonna....
chinese: 妈的！导航电脑失灵了！我要坠毁了！我要……

english: My pod landed in a lower floor and it's pitch black in here. Somebody tell me where I am.
chinese: 我的空投舱落到下层了，这里面漆黑一片。谁能告诉我我在哪儿？

english: Someone get me out of this pod! Heeelp meee.
chinese: 谁来把我从这舱里弄出去！救——命——啊。

english: We just located the pod containing Captain Marin's body. I think I'm gonna be sick.
chinese: 我们刚找到装着 Marin 上尉遗体的空投舱。我想吐。

english: To all Marines at the Storage Tower. This is Lt.Hollenbeck. Regroup at my position ASAP.
chinese: 数据存储塔的全体陆战队员注意，我是 Hollenbeck 中尉。尽快到我的位置集结。

english: Aaaah! My pod! It's on fire!!!
chinese: 啊——！我的空投舱！着火了！！！

english: HQ, this is Cobra Squad. We have assembled and are advancing.
chinese: 总部，这里是眼镜蛇小队。我们已集结完毕，正在推进。

english: HQ, this is Kodiak squad and we're in deep shit. Send... aaahh!
chinese: 总部，这里是棕熊小队。我们麻烦大了。快派……啊——！

english: Rutger and Mills, accompany Kane down to distribution.
chinese: Rutger、Mills，陪 Kane 下配电区。

english: Will do.
chinese: 遵命。

english: Somebody help me! I'm trapped down in level 8. They're gonna be coming through any second!
chinese: 谁来救救我！我被困在第 8 层了。它们随时都会冲进来！

english: Kane. This is Rhodes. Find me, we gotta get moving.
chinese: Kane，我是 Rhodes。来找我，咱们得赶紧行动。

english: Kane, where are you? Find me so we can get the hell out of here.
chinese: Kane，你在哪儿？快来找我，咱们好离开这鬼地方。

english: Kane, this is Rhodes. What are you doin'? Find me so we can get on with our mission.
chinese: Kane，我是 Rhodes。你磨蹭什么呢？快来找我，咱们好继续执行任务。

english: Greetings, Corporal Rhodes. You must locate the security interfaces. There is one at the top of each tower that must be disabled to gain access to the Core. But be careful, only Corporal Kane can access them.
chinese: 你好，Rhodes 下士。你们必须找到安保接口。每座塔的顶部各有一个，全部解除后才能进入核心。但要小心，只有 Kane 下士才能操作它们。

english: This is Falcon 1, awaiting activation of the hangar doors.
chinese: 这里是猎鹰一号，等待机库大门开启。

english: This is Falcon 1. We're burning up fuel here. I need those hangar doors opened.
chinese: 这里是猎鹰一号。我们在白白烧油，赶紧把机库大门打开。

english: This is Falcon 1, what's the hold up? This zone is hot and I need to land!
chinese: 这里是猎鹰一号，还在磨蹭什么？这片空域交火激烈，我必须降落！

english: That heat source in the center of the building is moving rapidly towards the hangar. Whatever it is, you can bet it isn't friendly.
chinese: 大楼中央的那个热源正快速逼近机库。不管那是什么，保准不是友军。

english: Hot damn, the hangar doors are open! Falcon 1 to commence landing procedure.
chinese: 好家伙，机库大门开了！猎鹰一号开始降落程序。

english: Falcon 1 has landed. Troops are being deployed. Shit, something's under the hangar floor.
chinese: 猎鹰一号已着陆，部队正在下机。妈的，机库地板下面有东西。

english: Shit. It's trying to beat it's way through. Immediate dust off in...
chinese: 妈的，它想砸穿地板冲上来。立即起飞，倒计时……

english: A Strogg creature just tore through the hangar floor like it was wet cardboard. It's huge - I estimate 30 feet tall. We're taking heavy casualties.
chinese: 一头 Strogg 怪物刚把机库地板撕开了，跟撕湿纸板似的。这家伙巨大无比，目测有三十英尺高。我们伤亡惨重。

english: The creature... is almost impervious... to light weapons fire!
chinese: 那怪物……轻武器火力……几乎伤不了它！

english: Nothing's slowing it down!
chinese: 什么都拦不住它！

english: Well done, Corporal Kane! The Core security interface from Data Storage is disabled. Corporal Rhodes, you should remain there and guard the console in case the Strogg should attempt to reactivate it. Corporal Kane should locate the tram and take it to the Data Processing Tower. There he will have to deactivate the second security station at the top. Strauss out.
chinese: 干得好，Kane 下士！数据存储塔通往核心的安全接口已解除。Rhodes 下士，你应留在原地看守控制台，以防 Strogg 试图将其重新激活。Kane 下士则应找到轨道车，乘它前往数据处理塔，在塔顶解除第二个安全站。Strauss 通话完毕。

english: HQ, this Cobra squad. We've just taken level five and we are continuing to advance.
chinese: 总部，这里是眼镜蛇小队。我们刚拿下第五层，正继续推进。

english: Kane, this is Hollenbeck. Good job, the TSD's are being redeployed. Now get back up here on the double.
chinese: Kane，我是 Hollenbeck。干得好，TSD 正在重新部署。现在跑步回到上面来。

english: HQ, this is Scorpion squad. We�ve taken heavy casualties and need an evac at the bridge extraction point.
chinese: 总部，这里是天蝎小队。我们伤亡惨重，请求在大桥撤离点实施撤离。

english: Scorpion, no evac units are in your immediate area. Secure the bridge control room and sit tight.
chinese: 天蝎小队，你们附近没有撤离单位。守住大桥控制室，原地待命。

english: Secure the bridge? What the hell with? There�s only two of us left.
chinese: 守住大桥？拿个屁守啊？我们就剩两个人了。

english: Do the best you can, Scorpion. An evac unit is en route. HQ, out.
chinese: 尽力撑住，天蝎小队。撤离单位已在路上。总部通话完毕。

english: All right, Marines, haul ass. The clock is ticking and this is one flight we don�t wanna miss.
chinese: 好了，弟兄们，撒腿快跑。时间不等人，这趟班机咱们可误不起。

english: H Q, this is Viper squad! Our Lieutenant is severely wounded. Request immediate evac.
chinese: 总部，这里是毒蛇小队！我们中尉伤势严重，请求立即撤离。

english: I wish we could help but evac from your current location is impossible. That zone is too hot.
chinese: 我们也想帮忙，但你们当前位置无法撤离。那片区域交火太激烈了。

english: Shit. All right, thanks HQ. We�ll get out of here somehow.
chinese: 妈的。行吧，多谢总部。我们自己想办法出去。

english: This is Eagle 17, preparing to make a strafing run.
chinese: 这里是雄鹰十七号，准备进行一轮扫射。

english: This is command HQ to all units. A full retreat has been ordered. All squads are to meet at Waste Facility for immediate evac.
chinese: 指挥总部呼叫各单位。全面撤退命令已经下达。所有小队立即前往废料处理厂集合，马上撤离。

english: H Q! H Q! This is Kodiak squad. Strogg have overrun our position. I request an immediate artillery barrage on our location!
chinese: 总部！总部！这里是棕熊小队。Strogg 已经冲垮了我们的阵地。请求立即向我方坐标实施炮火覆盖！

english: Walker Squad Bison, you are directed to take up a defensive position at your current location.
chinese: 野牛机甲小队，命令你们在当前位置转入防御。

english: H Q, there�s a shitload of Strogg on our tail.
chinese: 总部，我们屁股后面咬着一大帮 Strogg。

english: Understood. Bison Squad, full halt and deploy weapons. We�re buying the evac some time.
chinese: 明白。野牛小队，全体停止前进，展开武器。我们给撤离争取时间。

english: Eagle 2, Eagle 9, this is Eagle 12. Form up on me.  Let�s see if we can�t offer Bison squad some assistance.
chinese: 雄鹰二号、雄鹰九号，这里是雄鹰十二号。向我编队。咱们去给野牛小队搭把手。

english: There are freakin' zombies down here. I just killed one, but it bit me. Shit, I need the medic.
chinese: 下面全他妈是僵尸。我刚干掉一个，可被它咬了。妈的，我得找医疗兵。

english: Where the hell is everyone? I can't get readings on any medchips. We gotta regroup or they're gonna pick us apart.
chinese: 人都他妈哪儿去了？所有医疗芯片都读不到信号。再不集结，我们就要被它们一个个撕碎了。

english: Warning!  Incoming attack!
chinese: 警告！敌方来袭！

english: We're hit! Another missile's locked on. Firing counter measures.
chinese: 我们中弹了！又一枚导弹锁定，正在发射干扰弹。
